titleStmt.title: SII 34.77: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 77. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājarāja Rājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I), 17th year = A.D. 1002.

Nārāyaṇan Ambalattāḍi, a madhyastha of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank made a gift of gold for the midday offerings on new-moon days in the Tirukkāṟkōṭīśvaram temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ pOlap perunilaccelviyum tanakkEy Urimai pūṇṭamai manakko
ḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi vēṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikai
pāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭu tanne
ḻilvaḷar Ūḻiuḷ Ellāviyāṇṭum toḻutaka viḷaṅkum Iyāṇṭē ceḻiyarait
tēcukōḷ śrīkōrājarājarājakēsari panmarkku yāṇṭu 10 7 Āvatu vaṭakarai Irājarāja vaḷanā
ṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīkāmaravalliccaturvveti maṅkalattu tirunallūr tirukkāṟkōṭīśvarat
tu mahaādevar vacam Ivvūr madhyastaṉ nārāyaṇa nampalattāṭi Idevarkku Amāvāsitōṟum Ucci
yampōtu san=tiyil Eṭukkun tiruvamirtinaṭṭa ney Amirtu ceyvippataṟku Arici kuṟuṇiyum kaṟiyamu
tu Onṟum Araippiṭi neyyamitum Aṭaikkāyamutum Iraṇṭupākkum veṟṟilaiyum tayiramutu Uriyu
m Āka Ittaṉaiyum tiruvamirtu Aṭṭuamirtu ceyvippataṟku kuṭutta pon 1 m Ipponnukku palicai
yākac cantrātittavaṟamāvāsi tōṟu muṭṭāmē Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavār Idevarkku śrīkāriyam ceyyum deva
kanmikaḷē Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
